deploy.startCommand: cd fullstack/backend && echo 'Starting Django setup...' && python manage.py migrate && echo 'Running collectstatic...' && python manage.py collectstatic --noinput --clear && echo 'Collectstatic completed' && (if [ "$CREATE_SUPERUSER" = "true" ]; then echo 'Creating superuser...' && python create_superuser.py; fi) && echo 'Starting Gunicorn...' && gunicorn camelq_payslip.wsgi --bind 0.0.0.0:$PORT
